name: Phoenix
text: Psionic Bond — Hero Resource: Remove 1 power counter from Phoenix Force → generate a [wild] resource. (Limit once per phase.)
real_text: Psionic Bond — Hero Resource: Remove 1 power counter from Phoenix Force → generate a [wild] resource. (Limit once per phase.)
flavor: "The Phoenix chose me, but I alone decide who I am!"

linked_card.name: Jean Grey
linked_card.text:
Setup: Put your Phoenix Force upgrade into play, RESTRAINED side faceup. Place 4 power counters on it.

Response: After you make a basic recovery, place 1 power counter on Phoenix Force.
linked_card.real_text: Setup: Put your Phoenix Force upgrade into play, [[RESTRAINED]] side faceup. Place 4 power counters on it. [star] Response: After you make a basic recovery, place 1 power counter on Phoenix Force.

name: Phoenix Force
text: Permanent. You gain the [[RESTRAINED]] trait. Forced Response: After the last power counter is removed from here, flip this card.
real_text: Permanent. You gain the [[RESTRAINED]] trait. Forced Response: After the last power counter is removed from here, flip this card.

linked_card.name: Phoenix Force
linked_card.text:
Permanent.

You gain the UNLEASHED trait.

Phoenix gets -2 THW and +2 ATK.

Forced Response: After a power counter is placed here, if there are 4 or more power counters here, flip this card.
linked_card.real_text: Permanent. You gain the [[UNLEASHED]] trait. Phoenix gets -2 THW and +2 ATK. Forced Response: After a power counter is placed here, if there are 4 or more power counters here, flip this card.

name: Cyclops
text: Response: After Cyclops enters play, place 2 power counters on Phoenix Force. Response: When Cyclops leaves play, remove 2 power counters from Phoenix Force.
real_text: Response: After Cyclops enters play, place 2 power counters on Phoenix Force. Response: When Cyclops leaves play, remove 2 power counters from Phoenix Force.

name: White Hot Room
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust White Hot Room → choose: • Place 1 power counter on Phoenix Force. • Heal 2 damage from Jean Grey.
real_text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust White Hot Room → choose: • Place 1 power counter on Phoenix Force. • Heal 2 damage from Jean Grey.

name: Phoenix Suit
text:
Phoenix gains the [[AERIAL]] trait.
While you have the [[RESTRAINED]] trait, you gain steady.
While you have the [[UNLEASHED]] trait, you gain retaliate 1.
real_text:
Phoenix gains the [[AERIAL]] trait.
While you have the [[RESTRAINED]] trait, you gain steady.
While you have the [[UNLEASHED]] trait, you gain retaliate 1.
illustrator: Roberto Di Salvo & Javier Mena Guerrero

name: Rise from the Ashes
text: Interrupt: When you would be defeated, remove this card from the game → ready your identity and restore it to its printed hit point value instead. Remove each power counter from Phoenix Force.
real_text: Interrupt: When you would be defeated, remove this card from the game → ready your identity and restore it to its printed hit point value instead. Remove each power counter from Phoenix Force.

name: Telekinetic Shield
text: Attach to a friendly character. Forced Interrupt: When attached character would take damage from an enemy attack, place that damage here instead. Then, if there is at least 5 damage here, discard Telekinetic Shield.
real_text: Attach to a friendly character. Forced Interrupt: When attached character would take damage from an enemy attack, place that damage here instead. Then, if there is at least 5 damage here, discard Telekinetic Shield.

name: Mental Paralysis
text: Hero form only. Attach to a non-[[ELITE]] minion. Attached minion cannot activate. Forced Response: After you flip to alter-ego form, discard this card.
real_text: Hero form only. Attach to a non-[[ELITE]] minion. Attached minion cannot activate. Forced Response: After you flip to alter-ego form, discard this card.

name: Mind Control
text:
Attach to a non-[[ELITE]] minion.
Take control of attached minion and treat it as a [[CONTROLLED]] ally with a blank text box. Its THW is equal to its printed SCH and it takes 1 consequential damage after it thwarts or attacks.
real_text:
Attach to a non-[[ELITE]] minion.
Take control of attached minion and treat it as a [[CONTROLLED]] ally with a blank text box. Its THW is equal to its printed SCH and it takes 1 consequential damage after it thwarts or attacks.

name: Telekinetic Attack
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 7 damage to an enemy. If you have the [[UNLEASHED]] trait, this attack deals 2 additional damage and gains overkill.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 7 damage to an enemy. If you have the [[UNLEASHED]] trait, this attack deals 2 additional damage and gains overkill.
flavor: "Poor fool, you have no idea how hopelessly outmatched you are!" —Phoenix

name: Psychic Blast
text: Hero Action: Deal 4 damage to the villain. If you have the [[UNLEASHED]] trait, deal 4 damage to each minion engaged with you.
real_text: Hero Action: Deal 4 damage to the villain. If you have the [[UNLEASHED]] trait, deal 4 damage to each minion engaged with you.
flavor: "We fight on different battlefields. Your strength won't help you in mine." —Phoenix

name: Telepathic Trickery
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 4 threat from a scheme. If you have the [[UNLEASHED]] trait, stun and confuse an enemy.
real_text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 4 threat from a scheme. If you have the [[UNLEASHED]] trait, stun and confuse an enemy.
flavor: "They can't see us because I won't let them." —Phoenix

name: Phoenix Firebird
text: Hero Action: Choose: • Remove 1 power counter from Phoenix Force → ready Phoenix. • Place 2 power counters on Phoenix Force.
real_text: Hero Action: Choose: • Remove 1 power counter from Phoenix Force → ready Phoenix. • Place 2 power counters on Phoenix Force.

name: Banshee
text: [star] Response: After Banshee thwarts, confuse a minion.
real_text: [star] Response: After Banshee thwarts, confuse a minion.
flavor: "Ye'd best cover yer ears, lads...this is goin' to hurt!"

name: Marvel Girl
text: [star] Interrupt: When Marvel Girl attacks a minion, remove X threat from the main scheme, where X is that minion's printed SCH.
real_text: [star] Interrupt: When Marvel Girl attacks a minion, remove X threat from the main scheme, where X is that minion's printed SCH.
flavor: "Whatever it is you're up to, it's over now."

name: Mission Training
text:
Attach to an [[X-MEN]] ally. Max 1 [[TRAINING]] upgrade per ally.
Attached ally gets +1 THW point and +2 hit points.
real_text:
Attach to an [[X-MEN]] ally. Max 1 [[TRAINING]] upgrade per ally.
Attached ally gets +1 THW point and +2 hit points.

name: Psychic Manipulation
text: Play only if your identity has the [[PSIONIC]] trait. Interrupt (thwart): When the villain schemes, this activation removes threat instead of placing it.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[PSIONIC]] trait. Interrupt (thwart): When the villain schemes, this activation removes threat instead of placing it.

name: Mutant Peacekeepers
text: Play only if your identity has the [[X-MEN]] trait. Hero Action (thwart): Exhaust your hero and any number of [[X-MEN]] allies → remove X threat from among schemes in play, where X is the total THW of those characters.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[X-MEN]] trait. Hero Action (thwart): Exhaust your hero and any number of [[X-MEN]] allies → remove X threat from among schemes in play, where X is the total THW of those characters.

name: Swift Retribution
text: Hero Action (attack): The villain schemes. Deal 4 damage to the villain.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): The villain schemes. Deal 4 damage to the villain.
flavor: "Return what you've taken and I'll let you go. This time. But next time, you won't be so lucky. And I won't be so kind." —Moon Knight

name: Passion for Justice
text: Max 2 per deck. Interrupt: When you spend this card to play a [[THWART]] event, that event removes 1 additional threat.
real_text: Max 2 per deck. Interrupt: When you spend this card to play a [[THWART]] event, that event removes 1 additional threat.

name: Storm
text: Reduce the cost to play Storm by 1 if your identity has the [[MUTANT]] or [[X-MEN]] trait. [star] Interrupt: When Storm thwarts a scheme, move 2 threat from that scheme to another scheme.
real_text: Reduce the cost to play Storm by 1 if your identity has the [[MUTANT]] or [[X-MEN]] trait. [star] Interrupt: When Storm thwarts a scheme, move 2 threat from that scheme to another scheme.

name: Cerebro
text: Play only if your identity has the [[MUTANT]] trait. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Cerebro → search the top 5 cards of your deck for an [[X-MEN]] ally (search your whole deck instead if you control a [[PSIONIC]] character) and add that ally to your hand. (Shuffle.)
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[MUTANT]] trait. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Cerebro → search the top 5 cards of your deck for an [[X-MEN]] ally (search your whole deck instead if you control a [[PSIONIC]] character) and add that ally to your hand. (Shuffle.)

name: Psychic Rapport
text: Team-Up (Cyclops and Phoenix). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action: Ready Cyclops and Phoenix. Choose to either return a Cyclops card from your discard pile to your hand or place 2 power counters on Phoenix Force.
real_text: Team-Up (Cyclops and Phoenix). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action: Ready Cyclops and Phoenix. Choose to either return a Cyclops card from your discard pile to your hand or place 2 power counters on Phoenix Force.

name: Consume the World
text: Permanent. While there is no threat here, this scheme loses the [amplify] icon. Forced Response: After threat is placed here, if there is at least 12 threat here, the players lose the game.
